sourceMovie.title: New World
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: New World works as a thriller movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The thriller and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Mesrine: Killer Instinct
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If New World clicked for you, Mesrine: Killer Instinct (2008) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after New World?
faq.answer: Try Mesrine: Killer Instinct, The Long Good Friday, The Air I Breathe—each shares DNA with New World while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is New World?
faq.answer: New World (2013) is best described as Thriller, Crime, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is New World worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this thriller lane.
